role_summary: Civil Rights History Project interviewee; the LoC oral history is the primary archival source for this catalog page.

biographical_paragraph: Simeon Wright's oral history is held at the Library of Congress as entry 138 of the Civil Rights History Project (American Folklife Center accession AFC 2010/039) [src: 1]. The LoC transcript carries an ingestion-only audit tier: the catalog ingested the transcript but did not subject it to the audit cascade, and any specific biographical or quoted claims should be confirmed against external archives before citation. Independent biographical sourcing for an extended orientation paragraph is pending; the strongest signal currently available is the embedding pattern named in the AI's reading above.
